text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After running errands with Eishin Flash, we head
toward one last location.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. Here is the inn that's hosting the
immersive lecture on Japanese culture.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Learn from the past, as they say! Learning about
time-honored traditions should help me deepen
my understanding of modern trends!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash has become determined to learn all
about the newest trends in Japanese culture after
singing karaoke with her friend the other day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And to facilitate that, we're attending a lecture
on Japanese culture.

text_block_list.name: Hostess
text_block_list.text: Here is a typical guest room at this inn.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, I just recalled that there is specific
etiquette for walking into a Japanese-style room.

text_block_list.name: Hostess
text_block_list.text:
My, aren't you well-informed? You must be
talking about how one shouldn't step on the
cracks between the tatami mats.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I very nearly did just that. I shall be more cautious
from now on.

text_block_list.name: Hostess
text_block_list.text:
Please, there is no need to be nervous. Relax and
enjoy the tour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Eishin Flash remains on high alert as the
tour goes on, until...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'm surprised that all the hot water must be
replaced every time they clean. From a
cost-efficiency standpoint, that seems rather
wasteful...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: But it is important to prioritize the health and safety of guests, and that's a fantastic way to keep everything hygienic.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe they are able to serve meals so
punctually despite how many rooms there are
here...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
This is the true epitome of time management. I
take my hat off to them!

text_block_list.name: Hostess
text_block_list.text:
That concludes today's lecture. What did you
think?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It was marvelous beyond words. In fact, I would
love to take an even more in-depth tour.
choice_data_list: Sounds like you really enjoyed yourself!
Sounds like you really enjoyed yourself!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I did. Traditional Japanese
hospitality—"omotenashi" truly is exceptional.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Being provided a traditional yukata as sleepwear
is also a valuable experience from a cultural
perspective.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Above all, every element of this facility works in
harmony to make guests feel at home.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Now, I'm painfully aware that everything I
thought I knew about Japanese-style inns was
superficial at best.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I still have much to learn... It seems a shame to
depart while I am still so ignorant.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash seems reluctant to leave. In that
case...
choice_data_list:
Would you like to stay here overnight
sometime?

Would you like to ask the hostess some
questions?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That is an intriguing suggestion. I could certainly
learn much more if I actually spent a night here.

text_block_list.name: Hostess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, we would be honored to have you! There's
plenty to enjoy here.

text_block_list.name: Hostess
text_block_list.text:
First, there's our wonderful hot spring where you
can wash away your fatigue.

text_block_list.name: Hostess
text_block_list.text:
Then in the evening, our chefs prepare dinner
using plenty of fresh, seasonal ingredients. You
can enjoy your meal in your room.

text_block_list.name: Hostess
text_block_list.text:
Should you visit us in the summer, you could
watch fireworks light up the night sky.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
W-wonderful! I shall make a summer reservation
right now.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
choice_data_list: Weren't you going to make a reservation?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Ohne Fleiß kein Preis. There is no gain without
pain.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: In other words... I shall begin saving money.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
If I reduce my budget for baking ingredients by
20%, I should be able to stay here... in precisely
three years, six months' time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like booking a room here isn't cheap.
But at least Eishin Flash now has a new goal to
strive toward.

text_block_list.name: Hostess
text_block_list.text:
You wish to know more? In that case, I would
recommend you attend our immersive
housekeeping seminar.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Oh! I would love to attend that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Pardon the intrusion. Thank you for staying with
us today.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
If there is anything we can provide to make your
stay more comfortable, please don't hesitate to
ask.

text_block_list.name: Hostess
text_block_list.text: Well done! ♪ That was a picture-perfect greeting.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much. However... sitting on my
knees for so long is quite painful...

text_block_list.name: Hostess
text_block_list.text:
Yes, it's a difficult position to maintain if you're
not accustomed to it. I remember struggling with
it too when I first became a hostess.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Both learning and traditions are cultivated
through the accumulation of experiences.

text_block_list.name: Hostess
text_block_list.text: Indeed. That is exactly how traditions are built.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The building of tradition... Thank you very much.
This was most informative.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash's eyes glitter with newfound joy and
knowledge as she thanks the hostess for her time.
